10100111111100010001111010000001011011000011100110 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  101 = 10 * 1
  111 = 1 * 11
  0011 = 00 * 11
  1101 = 1 * 101
  00010 = 000 * 10
  00110 = 0011 * 0
  11111 = 11 * 111
  000111 = 000 * 111
  110110 = 1101 * 10
  1010011 = 101 * 0011
  00000010 = 000 * 00010
  00111101 = 0011 * 1101
  00011100110 = 000111 * 00110
  101001111111 = 1010011 * 11111
  0001000111101 = 00010 * 00111101
  00000010110110 = 00000010 * 110110
  0000001011011000011100110 = 00000010110110 * 00011100110
  1010011111110001000111101 = 101001111111 * 0001000111101
  10100111111100010001111010000001011011000011100110 = 1010011111110001000111101 * 0000001011011000011100110
